faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Annadale home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool, silk, or cashmere garments, webbing in closet corners, silken tubes on fabric surfaces, and small beige or gold-colored moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice larvae casings or damage to carpets, upholstered furniture, and stored blankets. Our technicians provide thorough inspections to identify the extent of infestation in your Annadale home.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Annadale typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of treatments required. Minor infestations in a single room cost less, while whole-home treatments for severe cases require more comprehensive service. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.
